module relaxed_madd_nmadd.0.wasm

module relaxed_madd_nmadd.1.wasm
assert_return test-consistent-nondeterminism v128:ffff7f7fffff7f7fffff7f7fffff7f7f v128:00000040000000400000004000000040 v128:ffff7fffffff7fffffff7fffffff7fff -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
